## About Us
##  **AfricaDev** Consulting
Business Development and Advisory Firm For Africa
![](https://africadevconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/separator.png)
AfricaDev Consulting is a firm dedicated to support financial institutions, family-owned businesses, established companies and multinational corporations in their **African expansion success**.
Leveraging on a deep understanding of local markets, political frameworks and business culture, as well as an extensive network and expertise in complex problem-solving, AfricaDev Consulting is founded to play a key role in **helping companies to grow in Africa**.
The founder, expert consultants and partners that make up our team have extensive knowledge of the missing pieces that transform any project in Africa into successful returns for its stakeholders.
![](https://africadevconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/separator.png)
**Our services comprise business development, financial advisory and strategy consulting :** we have firm belief that connections combined with knowledge are power, besides our network and professional knowledge we work with full focus and attention to the detail that help our clients in their critical projects from strategy to implementation.
![](https://africadevconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/016-visibility.png)
## **Representation & Business Development For International Companies**
Your company’s business partner in Africa and/or your representative on the ground
![](https://africadevconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/020-analytics-2.png)
##  **Investment & Financial Advisory Services**
Identification of investment opportunities across a range of different sectors and support services on strategic financial transactions in the region
![](https://africadevconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/010-invoice.png)
## **Establishment Services in Morocco / Strategy Consulting in Africa**
Advice on company’s structuring (including through other jurisdictions for efficient tax purposes) and provides high-quality market research in the largest African markets
![](https://africadevconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/008-browser.png)
## **Works with an Ecosystem of Partners in Middle East & Africa/ Senior Advisors worldwide**
Have various partners in legal, regulatory, tax, accountancy, recruitment, strategy and corporate finance (fund raising and M&A) to provide a tailored one-stop service as well as senior advisors which are expert consultants in their respective regions (Africa, Asia, Europe, US)
![](https://africadevconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/013-email.png)
## **Supported by LixCap research and advisory teams**
Investment advisory services firm in Washington DC and Morocco for MEA projects dealing with access to finance, agriculture and investment, energy, economic growth and market analysis
![](https://africadevconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/001-billboard.png)
## **Partner of Opportunity Network**
A global digital matchmaking platform for businesses and HNWIs/UHNWIs
## Clients
We carry out business development and specific advisory projects in the region for **medium sized companies** and **multinational corporations in various sectors (re/insurance, banking, private equity, professional services, infrastructure and energy, consumer goods…)** but also for **government bodies and development finance institutions**.
## AfricaDev's References
## Why Should You **Work With Us?**
* We adopt a collaborative approach and advocate “best practice” in Africa.
* We are not subject to conflicting interests and all our loyalty goes to our clients.
* We keep it simple and tell it like it is.
* We can address temporary management “capacity” and “skills/competence” shortages.
* We provide a seemless service and source sound information through working with field partners and experts across the African ontinent.
* We have developed solid relationships worldwide which sustains our cross-border efficiency.
[ LET'S TALK ABOUT YOUR PROJECT ](http://africadevconsulting.com/contact-us/)
![](https://africadevconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/brainstorming.png)
